Senior AI Product Manager - Generative AI Platform
Acme AI - Remote (Europe)

About the role:
We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead our Generative AI platform. You will own the strategy and roadmap for LLM-powered features used by enterprise customers globally. The role partners with engineering, data science, design, and go-to-market teams.

What you will do:
- Define the vision and 12-month roadmap for our AI platform
- Write detailed PRDs covering API contracts, evaluation thresholds, latency budgets, and non-determinism handling
- Drive go-to-market for new AI capabilities including enablement playbooks and customer success workflows
- Build measurement frameworks for adoption, accuracy, drift, and incident response
- Partner with security, legal, and privacy teams on GDPR-compliant AI deployment

What we are looking for:
- 8+ years of product management experience including 3+ years building production AI/ML or LLM-powered products
- Track record of shipping high-impact features with measurable outcomes (adoption, latency, precision)
- Strong technical depth: comfortable reading API docs, writing SQL, sketching architecture
- Experience with RAG, multi-agent systems, prompt engineering, and evaluation frameworks
- Excellent written and verbal English; ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders

Nice to have:
- Hands-on experience with OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Gemini APIs
- Familiarity with Cloudflare Workers, edge compute, serverless architectures
- AWS Solutions Architect or equivalent certification

Compensation: 110-150K EUR base plus equity. Generous remote work policy across Europe.
